questions.question: How many seats are authorized on the board or committee, how many are currently filled, and how many vacancies exist?
questions.answer: The Conservation Advisory Council is authorized to have 9 members appointed by the Village Board of Trustees. Currently, 5 seats are filled: Alan Antin (term expires 12/6/2027), Robin Buco (12/6/2027), Mark von Holstein (12/6/2027), Zachary Strauss (12/3/2028), and Renee Lomax (12/3/2028), plus a Chairperson (unnamed). There are 3 listed vacancies. Note: It is unclear if the Chairperson is one of the 5 named members or an additional filled seat.
questions.gap: The chairperson's identity is not specified, making the exact count of filled seats ambiguous. No current date is provided on the page to confirm the vacancy information is up to date.
